plan_metadata.name: General Teams Agent Azure OpenAI py playground

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the dropdown menu within the "New Project" interface to select it.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" interface to select the agent type.
Click the "Python" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" selection prompt to choose or locate the project's root folder.
